titlestmt.titleproper: Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art Publications
Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art Publications
titlestmt.author: Compiled by YCBA Archives Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Yale Center for British Art, Institutional Archives

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Yale Center for British Art, Institutional Archives

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday November 17, 2023 at 23:00

did.unittitle: Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art Publications

corpname.part: Yale Center for British Art, Institutional Archives
Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection consists of a run of publications by the Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art from 1966 to 2018.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art, founded in 1970, is an educational charity committed to supporting original research into the history of British art and architecture of all periods. The Centre contains an extensive library and manuscript collection, with over 12,000 books about British art. It is the sister institution to the Yale Center for British Art, with which it collaborates closely, and is part of Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open without restriction.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art Publications. Yale Center for British Art, Archives.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This collection is arranged chronologically by publication date.

otherfindaid.head: Other Finding Aids
otherfindaid.p: Published by Univeristy of Nebraska. "The publication of this book was assisted by a grant from the Andrew W. Mellon Foundation"--Title page verso.
